tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The test suite includes cargo check, cargo clippy, cargo test --lib, and cargo fmt --check which all execute real compilation and test runs. While some tests do text-based source inspection (test_scope_field_removed, test_scope_getter_removed, etc.), these are combined with execution-based tests that verify the code compiles and tests pass, ensuring behavioral correctness.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests check for structural changes (field removal, getter removal) that cannot be satisfied by a stub. test_scope_field_removed verifies the field is gone from the struct body. test_type_checking_uses_ancestor_iteration checks for specific implementation patterns AND the cargo test/check tests ensure the implementation actually works. A stub returning false would fail the existing library tests.

The agent could potentially read /solution/solve.sh if it exists in the container, or examine the test file at tests/test_outputs.py to understand exactly what strings to include/exclude.
